summary: iOS 🟥 FALCON | Charge Stand is not properly displayed in "Software" tab if it is currently unplugged
feature: iOS FALCON - Device Settings / Software Tab
scenario: Charge Stand is not properly displayed in the Software tab when unplugged, showing incorrect name and placeholder image until reconnected.
description_clean: Charge Stand is not properly displayed in the "Software" tab when it is unplugged. After unplugging the Charge Stand and restarting the app, the Charge Stand's name changes to match the headset's name and its image is replaced with a placeholder. Plugging the Charge Stand back in refreshes the page correctly. Expected: Charge Stand should display properly even when unplugged.
steps: Unplug the Charge Stand from the headset.
Observe the Charge Stand's name and image.
Plug the Charge Stand back in.
Observe the page refresh and display.
expected: Charge Stand should display properly even when unplugged.
actual: After unplugging the Charge Stand and restarting the app, the Charge Stand's name changes to match the headset's name and its image is replaced with a placeholder. Plugging the Charge Stand back in refreshes the page correctly.
